use_cases: Hero section text that reveals dramatically as users scroll down
Landing page introductions with scroll-triggered word-by-word animation
Content sections where text gradually appears to maintain user attention
Storytelling sections that progressively reveal narrative text
Product feature reveals that build anticipation through controlled pacing
ai_summary: A scroll-triggered text reveal animation component that progressively fades in words as the user scrolls through a tall container. The component splits text into individual words and uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks to map scroll progress to opacity, creating a cinematic reveal effect. Features a dual-layer approach with ghost text at low opacity and animated text layers for visual depth and contrast.
